title: `links add / remove / list` — link management commands
description: Implement the three core link management commands. These read and write links.yaml and are the primary day-to-day interface for managing a link page.

features: add: reads config via findConfig()+readConfig(), appends new link, writes back with writeConfig()
add: validates url with validateUrl() — exit 1 with error if invalid
add: if a link with the same label already exists, error: 'A link with label <label> already exists. Use --update to replace it.'
remove: finds link by label (case-insensitive match), removes it, writes back
remove: if not found, print 'No link with label <label> found.' and exit 1
list: reads config, prints all links in a formatted table using chalk for colors
list: columns: index, label, url, icon (if set), scheduled status
list: if no links defined, print 'No links yet. Use: links add <label> <url>'
list: --json flag outputs raw JSON array of links
list: marks scheduled links with a clock icon and shows the date range

notes:
[GIA REJECTED] Hook(s) failed: 001-adr-compliance.py. Alignment score 0.8333 below threshold 1.0000
Case-insensitive label matching for remove. No fuzzy matching — exact label (case-insensitive). Keep output clean and human-readable without external table libraries.
